name: docling-mcp
description: Docling MCP Server - Document processing and analysis with remote API and local conversion support

version.title: Version
version.description: Version of the docling-mcp package to install.

install_extras.title: Installation Extras
install_extras.description: Optional extras to install. Options: '' (remote-only, lightweight), '[local]' (local conversion), '[local,llama-index-rag]', '[local,llama-stack]'

conversion_mode.title: Conversion Mode
conversion_mode.description: Choose 'remote' (requires service_url) or 'local' (requires [local] extra). Default: remote

service_url.title: Docling Service URL
service_url.description: URL of the Docling Serve API endpoint (required for remote mode). Example: https://your-docling-service.example.com

service_api_key.title: Service API Key
service_api_key.description: API key for authenticating with Docling Serve (optional, if required by your service). Leave empty if not needed.

service_timeout.title: Service Timeout (seconds)
service_timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for remote API requests. Range: 10-3600, Default: 300

fallback_to_local.title: Fallback to Local
fallback_to_local.description: If remote service is unavailable, automatically fall back to local conversion (requires [local] extra).

keep_images.title: Keep Images
keep_images.description: Generate and store page images while converting documents (applies to local mode).

do_ocr.title: Enable OCR
do_ocr.description: Enable Optical Character Recognition for scanned documents (applies to local mode).

do_table_structure.title: Enable Table Structure
do_table_structure.description: Enable table structure recognition (applies to local mode).
